case_studies.title: ModernThreads boosts checkout conversions by 32% with Flowloop
case_studies.headline: 32% lift in checkout conversion in 90 days
case_studies.summary: Fashion retailer ModernThreads used Flowloop’s behavioral analytics and on-site experiments to streamline their checkout flow, resulting in a 32% increase in completed orders and a 19% uplift in average order value.

case_studies.title: Shoply EU improves mobile checkout conversions by 21%
case_studies.headline: 21% increase in mobile conversion across 4 markets
case_studies.summary: Shoply EU consolidated fragmented analytics into Flowloop and ran targeted A/B tests on mobile product pages, driving a 21% improvement in mobile conversion rates and a 27% reduction in cart abandonment.

case_studies.title: QuickCart unlocks 16% conversion uplift with personalized journeys
case_studies.headline: 16% uplift in conversion from behavior-based personalization
case_studies.summary: Grocery marketplace QuickCart implemented Flowloop’s workflow automation to trigger personalized offers based on real-time behavior, increasing first-purchase conversion by 16% and boosting repeat orders.

case_studies.title: Northwind Health reduces onboarding time by 43%
case_studies.headline: 43% faster onboarding for 2,500+ clinicians
case_studies.summary: Northwind Health used Flowloop’s workflow automation to streamline clinician onboarding, cutting average onboarding time from 14 to 8 days while improving compliance audit scores.

case_studies.title: BrightFin boosts self-service adoption by 38%
case_studies.headline: 38% more customers using self-service in 6 months
case_studies.summary: Digital bank BrightFin deployed Flowloop’s product analytics to identify friction in their app’s support flows, leading to a 38% increase in self-service usage and a 22% drop in support tickets.

case_studies.title: ZenLayer grows trial-to-paid conversion by 18%
case_studies.headline: 18% improvement in trial-to-paid in one quarter
case_studies.summary: SaaS vendor ZenLayer relied on Flowloop’s product analytics to understand activation milestones, introducing guided onboarding that increased trial-to-paid conversion by 18%.

case_studies.title: University of North centralizes student engagement analytics
case_studies.headline: Single view of engagement across 12 departments
case_studies.summary: The University of North combined LMS, CRM, and event data into Flowloop, creating a unified view of student engagement and boosting campaign response rates.

case_studies.title: ForgeWorks improves sales forecasting accuracy by 29%
case_studies.headline: 29% more accurate sales forecasts with CRM integrations
case_studies.summary: Manufacturing leader ForgeWorks connected ERP and CRM data into Flowloop, improving forecast accuracy while shortening the sales cycle by 12%.

case_studies.title: Helio Support reduces response times by 41%
case_studies.headline: 41% reduction in first-response time using automation
case_studies.summary: Helio Support used Flowloop’s workflow automation to route tickets and trigger playbooks, cutting first-response times sharply while increasing CSAT.

case_studies.title: ClarityCare increases patient portal adoption by 26%
case_studies.headline: 26% more patients engaging digitally
case_studies.summary: ClarityCare Clinics leveraged Flowloop analytics and nudges to drive patient portal sign-ups, increasing adoption and reducing front-desk call volume.

plan_addons.name: Priority Support
plan_addons.description: 24/7 priority email and chat support with 1-hour first-response SLA.

plan_addons.name: Advanced Analytics
plan_addons.description: Advanced reporting, custom dashboards, and data export to your warehouse.

plan_addons.name: Onboarding Services
plan_addons.description: Hands-on implementation support, training sessions, and configuration assistance.

plan_addons.name: Dedicated Success Manager
plan_addons.description: Named customer success manager with quarterly business reviews.

plan_addons.name: Data Migration
plan_addons.description: White-glove migration of historical data from your existing tools into Flowloop.

pricing_plans.name: Starter
pricing_plans.description: For small teams getting started with product analytics.

pricing_plans.name: Growth
pricing_plans.description: For growing teams that need SSO and advanced collaboration.

pricing_plans.name: Professional
pricing_plans.description: For product-led organizations that need granular permissions and audit logs.

pricing_plans.name: Enterprise
pricing_plans.description: For large enterprises requiring advanced security, custom SLAs, and dedicated support.
